title: Vijay Online Centre — Complete Digital Service Platform

requirements.text: Create a splash screen that displays the Vijay Online Centre logo (generated asset), app name 'Vijay Online Centre', and the Hindi welcome message 'स्वागत है आपका हमारे विजय ऑनलाइन प्लेटफ़ॉर्म पर'. The splash screen should display for ~2 seconds with a fade-in animation before transitioning to the login screen.

quotes: Show splash screen with logo and message: 'स्वागत है आपका हमारे विजय ऑनलाइन प्लेटफ़ॉर्म पर'

acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen shows logo, app name, and Hindi welcome message on app load
Transitions automatically to login screen after ~2 seconds
Uses Navy Blue background with Silver text styling

requirements.text: Implement a permanent Admin Login screen with hardcoded credentials: User ID 'vijay@123user', Password 'vijay@2026'. Admin session must never expire and must provide unlimited lifetime access. Store admin session in local state so the admin remains logged in across page reloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Separate Admin Login screen exists with User ID and Password fields
Only the exact credentials vijay@123user / vijay@2026 grant admin access
Admin session persists across page reloads (localStorage)
No session timeout or expiry logic for admin

requirements.text: Implement a Customer Login screen with two options: (1) Manual login using mobile number + a PIN/password, and (2) OTP-based login using mobile number (simulated OTP flow since real SMS is not supported — display OTP in-app for demo). Customer accounts must never expire and support unlimited registered users stored in the Motoko backend.

quotes: Mobile OTP login OR manual login option

acceptanceCriteria: Customer login screen offers both manual and OTP login modes
Manual login accepts mobile number + password
OTP mode shows a simulated OTP confirmation step
Customer accounts stored in backend with no expiry
Unlimited users can register and log in

requirements.text: Build a searchable service catalog displaying all 32 services: (1) Aay Praman Patra, (2) Jati Praman Patra, (3) Niwas Praman Patra, (4) Janm Praman Patra, (5) Mrityu Praman Patra, (6) Naya Pan Card, (7) Pan Card Correction, (8) Aadhar Card Update, (9) Voter ID New, (10) Ration Card Online, (11) Ayushman Card, (12) Driving License, (13) Naya Passport, (14) PF Withdrawal/KYC, (15) E-Shram Card, (16) Pension KYC, (17) Bijli Bill Payment, (18) Gadi ka Bima, (19) Railway Ticket, (20) Flight Ticket, (21) PM Kisan Registration, (22) Vridha Pension, (23) Vidhwa Pension, (24) Divyang Pension, (25) Kanya Sumangala Yojana, (26) UP Scholarship, (27) Charitra Praman Patra, (28) Police Verification, (29) Bhulekh, (30) Shadi Registration, (31) Udyam Registration, (32) Gazette Notification. Include a real-time search/filter input at the top. Each service is displayed as a tappable card.
acceptanceCriteria: All 32 services are listed as cards
Search input filters services in real time by name
Each service card is tappable and navigates to its form
Service names are displayed exactly as specified

requirements.text: Create a service application form for each of the 32 services. The form must include: Name (text), Mobile Number (numeric), Address (textarea), Document Upload (accepts image or PDF file, stored as base64 in backend), and a Submit button. On submission, save the form entry to the Motoko backend with a timestamp, assigned service name, customer info, and initial status 'Form Submitted'.

quotes: Each service opens a form including: Name, Mobile Number, Address, Document Upload (Image/PDF/Aadhaar/Biodata), Submit Button

acceptanceCriteria: All 32 services share the same form structure with service name pre-filled
Form validates that Name, Mobile, and Address are non-empty before submit
Document upload accepts image and PDF files
Submitted form is persisted in backend with timestamp and status 'Form Submitted'
Customer sees a confirmation message after successful submission

requirements.text: Build a real-time Admin Dashboard (accessible only when logged in as admin) that lists all submitted service forms. Each entry must show: Customer Name, Address, Selected Service, Uploaded document preview (image thumbnail or PDF icon), Date & Time of submission. Each entry must have two action buttons: Accept (green checkmark) and Reject (red cross). Accepting moves the order status to 'Payment Completed' or 'Processing'; Rejecting marks it 'Rejected'. The dashboard must refresh to show new submissions without a full page reload.

quotes: Customer Name, Address, Selected Service, Uploaded documents preview, Date & Time

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard is only accessible after admin login
All submitted forms are listed with customer name, address, service, document preview, date & time
Accept button updates order status to next stage
Reject button updates order status to Rejected
Dashboard polls or re-fetches to reflect new submissions in near real-time

requirements.text: Implement a dual-mode payment system. (1) Permanent QR Mode: Admin can upload a QR image once from the admin panel; this same QR image is stored in the backend and always displayed to customers on the payment screen. The uploaded UPI QR from the user's provided image (IMG_20260228_093258.jpg — ICICI Bank PhonePe QR) should be used as the default pre-loaded QR. (2) Auto QR Generate Mode: Admin enters a specific amount; the frontend generates a UPI payment QR code dynamically using a QR library encoding a UPI deep-link string. After the customer scans and pays, the admin can manually confirm payment, which advances the order status to 'Payment Completed'.

quotes: PERMANENT QR MODE: Admin uploads QR image once. Same QR always shown to customers.
AUTO QR GENERATE MODE: Admin enters amount. System auto generates payment QR.
Admin confirms payment OR auto confirmation.

acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel has a QR management section with Permanent QR upload and Auto-Generate QR tabs
Permanent QR: admin-uploaded QR image is stored and displayed to all customers
Auto QR: admin inputs amount and a UPI QR code is generated and shown to customer
Admin can confirm payment for any order, moving its status to Payment Completed
Payment screen shows correct QR based on the active mode

requirements.text: Add Flipkart-style 4-stage order tracking for each submitted service application. Stages in order: (1) Form Submitted → (2) Payment Completed → (3) Processing (Admin Working) → (4) Filling Completed. Display a horizontal progress stepper with icons/circles and connecting lines. The current active stage is highlighted. Customers can view their order tracking from 'My Orders' or a tracking section.

quotes: ORDER TRACKING (Flipkart Style): Form Submitted, Payment Completed, Processing (Admin Working), Filling Completed

acceptanceCriteria: Order tracking shows 4 stages as a visual stepper
Completed stages appear highlighted/filled; future stages are grayed out
Active stage is visually distinct
Order status in the backend maps to one of the 4 stages
Customers can access tracking for their submitted orders

requirements.text: Implement an auto-generated receipt that is shown (and printable/downloadable as HTML) when an order reaches 'Filling Completed' status. The receipt must include: Vijay Online Centre header, Service Name, Amount Paid, Date & Time, and Payment Status. Style the receipt like a professional invoice with the Navy Blue & Silver theme.

quotes: RECEIPT SYSTEM: Auto generate receipt including: Vijay Online Centre, Service Name, Amount Paid, Date & Time, Payment Status

acceptanceCriteria: Receipt is auto-shown when order status is Filling Completed
Receipt displays all required fields: centre name, service, amount, date/time, payment status
Receipt has a professional styled layout with Navy Blue & Silver theme
Receipt can be printed or downloaded via browser print dialog

requirements.text: Add a 'Vijay AI' chatbot assistant accessible via a floating chat button on all screens. The chatbot must support both Hindi and English. Implement a rule-based chatbot with pre-defined responses covering: how to apply for services, payment help, order tracking help, contact information, and general guidance about the platform. Display it as a slide-up chat panel with a 'Vijay AI — 24x7 Assistant' header.

quotes: AI CHATBOT: Add 24x7 assistant named Vijay AI

acceptanceCriteria: Floating chat button is visible on all screens
Chatbot panel opens with Vijay AI branding
Responds in Hindi or English based on user's message language
Provides helpful pre-defined responses for services, payments, tracking, and contact
Has a close/minimize button

requirements.text: Add a Contact section (accessible from bottom navigation or a dedicated screen) with three options: (1) WhatsApp Chat button that opens wa.me/918173064549, (2) Direct Call button that triggers tel:+918173064549, (3) Google Maps location button that opens maps.google.com with a search query for the business. Display the phone number +91 81730 64549 prominently.
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp button opens wa.me/918173064549 in a new tab
Call button triggers tel:+918173064549
Google Maps button opens maps search in a new tab
Phone number is clearly visible
Contact section is reachable from the bottom navigation

requirements.text: Apply a premium Navy Blue (#0A1628 / #0D2137) and Silver (#C0C0C0 / #E8E8E8) UI theme consistently across all screens. Use a bottom navigation bar with icons for: Home, Services, My Orders, Contact, and (admin-only) Dashboard. Include smooth page transition animations and card hover/press effects. Use professional fonts (system sans-serif or Google Fonts equivalent). Ensure the layout is mobile-first and optimized for small screens (360px width minimum) without any zoom or overflow issues.

quotes: Premium Navy Blue and Silver theme

acceptanceCriteria: All screens use Navy Blue and Silver color palette consistently
Bottom navigation bar present with at least 4 tabs
Page/route transitions have smooth animations
Layout renders correctly at 360px viewport width without horizontal scroll
No viewport zoom issues (correct meta viewport tag set)
Admin dashboard tab only visible when logged in as admin

requirements.text: Design and implement the complete Motoko backend actor to store: customer accounts (mobile, password hash, name), service order submissions (orderId, customerId, serviceName, name, mobile, address, documentBase64, status, amount, timestamp), admin QR settings (permanentQrBase64, autoQrAmount), and payment confirmation records. Expose query and update functions for: submitOrder, getOrdersByCustomer, getAllOrders (admin), updateOrderStatus (admin), setPermQR (admin), getPermQR, confirmPayment (admin).
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores all order submissions with full fields
Admin can fetch all orders via getAllOrders
Customers can fetch only their own orders via getOrdersByCustomer
updateOrderStatus accepts orderId and new status string
setPermQR and getPermQR manage the permanent QR image
All data persists across canister upgrades using stable variables

constraints: Admin credentials must be hardcoded as vijay@123user / vijay@2026 and never changeable from the UI
The uploaded UPI QR image (ICICI Bank PhonePe QR from IMG_20260228_093258.jpg) must be used as the default permanent QR
No real SMS/OTP gateway — OTP flow must be simulated in-app
No external AI API — Vijay AI chatbot must be fully rule-based
No external payment gateway integration — payment is UPI QR scan only with manual admin confirmation
All 32 service names must be displayed exactly as specified by the user
nonGoals: Real SMS OTP delivery via Twilio or any SMS gateway
Integration with any live government API or portal
Android APK packaging or Capacitor/Cordova wrapping
Multi-language full translation beyond Hindi/English chatbot responses

required: Vijay Online Centre app logo — navy blue circular badge with silver 'V' monogram and 'Vijay Online Centre' text in Hindi and English (vijay-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Splash screen background — deep navy blue gradient with subtle silver geometric pattern and light rays (splash-bg.dim_1080x1920.png)

Service category icon set — 8 flat silver-on-navy icons representing documents, certificates, pension, tickets, payment, ID cards, land records, and business registration (service-icons.dim_256x256.png)
